entries.quote: BharatPe Flex has been built to address that emerging need by combining the familiarity of UPI with the convenience of credit in a seamless and intuitive manner.
entries.signal: BharatPe is positioning Credit-on-UPI as the next evolution of digital payments, not a niche product — suggests aggressive volume ambitions.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] Management believes UPI habits are sticky enough that embedding credit into them is more powerful than acquiring credit card users separately.

entries.role: Country Head, Credit Cards & Merchant Acquiring, YES Bank
entries.quote: Our collaboration with BharatPe reflects our commitment to provide a seamless Credit-on-UPI experience that offers customers greater flexibility in managing their everyday transactions.
entries.signal: YES Bank is publicly anchoring its credit card and merchant business leadership to fintech co-brand partnerships as a deliberate growth vector.
entries.belief: [Inferred · High] YES Bank believes fintech distribution partnerships are the most scalable path to credit growth given its limited retail branch footprint relative to Tier-1 banks.
